prompt:
Convert the following todo list into a structured JSON document.

Return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields:
- title (string): name of the task list or project
- date (string or null): when the list was created
- tasks (list of objects): each with:
  - description (string): what needs to be done
  - priority (string): "high", "medium", or "low"
  - due_date (string or null): deadline if mentioned
  - status (string): "pending", "in_progress", or "done"
- categories (list of strings): groupings or projects
- tags (list of strings): 2-4 relevant keywords

Infer priorities and statuses from context words like "urgent", "ASAP", "later", "done", "completed".

Note:
{raw_note}
